creator: mailto1979@rediffmail.com
text: After the recent update of Gnome-shell and other Gnome packages, I cannot use SHIFT key + Mouse Left click to select an area to create screenshot. However, I can use gnome-screenshot tool to select an area to capture screenshot. In Gnome-shell, the keyboard-mouse combo to capture screenshot used to work great until the update. There was some other issues like gdm crashing which got fixed after the recent fix.  I feel, it may be related. Please let me know, if any logs needs to be send.
